Pebbles Ai

Pebbles Ai

📌

Hey Product Hunt! 🙋🏻‍♂️

My name is Dmytro Antoniuk, and I'm the Chief AI Officer at Pebbles Ai. I'm incredibly excited to introduce Pebbles Ai to the community today.

What are we solving?

Getting your first customers is the hardest part. You instantly get pulled in many different directions: market research, finding target leads, writing cold outreach, and managing follow-ups. [...] What is the solution?

Pebbles Ai brings your strategy, audience targeting, and outreach into a single, connected loop. It combines advanced neurosymbolic AI with real B2B growth expertise so teams can work together in one place.

 Learns your product and tone of voice from your brand docs, so you never re-explain your business
 Reads B2B market signals to find your ideal customers and split them into clear segments
 Acts like an in-house strategy consultancy and content agency in one
 Crafts multi-touch campaigns tailored to each segment automatically
 Keeps your data private in tenant-isolated architecture (CASA II certified) [...] Subscribe

AI sales tools

The only GTM orchestration platform you will need to successfully take your products & services to market. Pebbles AI is a Go-To-Market Operating System built for B2B revenue teams. It brings strategy, lead generation, outreach, sales, & shared company knowledge into one AI-powered workspace. Using neurosymbolic AI trained on your business, it helps teams plan campaigns, personalize outreach, generate qualified leads, & execute without switching between disconnected GTM tools.

results.title: Pebblely Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
4.5

Based on 4 reviews

Review Pebblely?

Pebblely is praised for its ability to transform mundane product images into visually appealing marketing assets, making it a valuable tool for small businesses and agencies with limited budgets. Users appreciate its ease of use and effectiveness in enhancing product photos, though some suggest improvements in mobile functionality and query handling. While the free trial is seen as too limited, the tool is generally regarded as beneficial for standing out in competitive markets. However, concerns about subscription practices and development continuity have been raised.

my overall experience is good but its still lack in some sections, the description area where you write query needs to be improved. any query other then specified categories sometimes give weird output. over all i will rate it 4 stars its worth but the most important area where they needs to be improved is lacking of functionality on mobile browser, if you login through phone, then there is no option there to give query in description area and as result you cannot write query and cannot fetch result. development team need to fix this issue. Over all its good tool to use and very handy.

#### What needs improvement

mobile browser functionality (1)query limitations (2)
